commit.message:
feat(jira-dc): email-mode auto-link, targeted repo lookup, and picker mentions (#15001)

Make the Jira Data Center integration usable on large self-hosted installs (1Finity/Fujitsu):

- FDE-86: resolve mentioned repos via targeted verify_repo_provider lookups instead of enumerating the user's full (1000-capped) repo list.
- Email-mode auto-link: auto-enroll an email-matched user on first @openhands; reactivate-or-insert (no duplicate rows), concurrency-safe.
- FDE-84: trigger on Jira picker mentions ([~name]/[~key]/[~accountid:key]) resolved lazily from /rest/api/2/myself.
- Hardening: dedup verified repos by canonical full_name; boundary-aware @openhands matching (ignores emails, matches @OpenHands); exact-unique Keycloak email resolution.

Live-validated end-to-end on a Replicated OHE install against real Jira DC + Bitbucket DC.

commit.message:
feat(azure-devops): add resolver mentions + org-level one-click webhook setup (#14991)

Adds the Azure DevOps @openhands resolver (PR + work-item mentions, run-as-mentioner with content-marker loop prevention) and an org-level one-click webhook setup. Includes a write-permission gate (permissionevaluationbatch, fails closed), deterministic/fail-closed work-item repo derivation, async webhook processing via BackgroundTasks, type-specific PR/work-item context loaders, and a stable dedup key. Validated live on a Replicated test install.
